evals.prompt: Create a 'Tether' logic that makes a 3D UI panel follow the user's hand smoothly but stay exactly 20cm away from it at all times.
evals.expected_output: A script using the TetherTS solver or custom vec3.lerp logic with a distance constraint.
expectations: Uses @input Component.SceneObject for the target (e.g., Hand)
Calculates distance between object and target
Sets object world position to targetPos + (dir * 0.2)
Includes a smoothing factor (lerp) for the follow behavior

evals.prompt: Implement a proximity-triggered sound effect that plays when the user gets within 1 meter of a spatial pedestal.
evals.expected_output: A script using DistanceEventsTS or a manual distance check with edge-triggering.
expectations: Includes an edge-trigger (check if state was previously > 1m)
Handles the 'exit' condition if needed to prevent repeated triggers
